channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Energy-saving scam uses Elon Musk’s name – Here’s the truth
item.description: A new scam using Elon Musk's name is making the rounds, promoting "energy-saving" devices and falsely linking the Tesla and SpaceX leader to the products.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Head of Consumer Financial Protection Bureau announces departure
item.description: The head of the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) announced his departure on Saturday, becoming the latest Biden administration holdover official to be ousted by the Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, The Hill

item.title: Wheeled wonder robot dog shows off crazy dance moves in all kinds of tough terrain
item.description: Lynx the robot dog from China is pushing boundaries of what autonomous mobile robots can achieve with a groundbreaking design and unique mobility.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How Trump turned the TikTok ban into a political asset
item.description: President Trump has managed to turn a controversial TikTok ban into a political advantage, framing himself as the savior of the popular video-sharing platform by offering the app a 75-day reprieve.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Only two weeks in and AI phenomenon DeepSeek is officially growing faster than ChatGPT
item.description: Exclusive Similarweb data reveals ChatGPT growth might have peaked, and, though it’s early days, a new competitor could be in line for its throne.
item.dc:creator: luke.hughes@futurenet.com (Luke Hughes), TechRadar

item.title: The Hawk Tuah girl remains radio silent after her crypto controversy
item.description: Has anyone checked in on Hawk Tuah girl? “When are we getting a new Talk Tuah episode? We’re starving for more Talk Tuah,” one X user posted yesterday. “Where is hawk tuah girl. Is she safe. Is she alright,” wrote another.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Logan and Jake Paul reveal ‘Paul American’ Max reality show
item.description: It looks like brothers Jake and Logan Paul won’t be squaring off in the boxing ring anytime soon. Instead, they are launching a family reality series, Paul American, starting March 27 on HBO Max.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Texas governor orders ban on DeepSeek, RedNote for government devices
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott issued a ban on Chinese artificial intelligence company DeepSeek for government-issued devices, becoming the first state to restrict the popular chatbot in such a manner.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Tesla promises more affordable EVs and could start its Robotaxi service in June – but I've heard this all before
item.description: Elon Musk makes more big Tesla promises during a quarterly earnings call, but I'd like to see it go back to doing what it does best.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: What is NaaS? Providers, delivery models, and benefits explained
item.description: Network as a service (NaaS) is a cloud service model that’s designed to let enterprise IT professionals order network infrastructure components from a menu of options, have them configured to fit their business needs, and have the whole thing delivered, running and managed in a matter of hours inste
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia's DLSS 4 is amazing – here's what AMD's FSR 4 needs to do to take it on
item.description: Team Green has succeeded in leaving me excited for the future of upscaling in games with DLSS 4, and I hope AMD can do the same with FSR 4.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: VMware offers fixes to severe vulnerabilities in VMware Aria
item.description: VMware has fixed multiple high-severity vulnerabilities affecting its cloud management platform (CMP), VMware Aria, which could allow attackers to steal sensitive credentials from the virtualization giant’s IT management and logging solutions.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Simple, secure device retirement
item.description: Is your IT service provider’s warehouse overrun by your depreciating end-of-life IT assets, and they don’t know what to do with them? Do your work-from-home and on-the-go employees have old devices lying around collecting dust and posing a security risk? Retire devices securely and responsibly—and a
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Renault Group strengthens decarbonisation commitment
item.description: Renault Group is committed to taking actions that help reduce its carbon footprint. By using HP IT Asset Disposition Service, the company’s end-of-use devices are securely collected, sanitised, and restored or responsibly recycled by HP.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: John Mulaney dunked on Meghan Markle and Prince Harry at star-studded Netflix event
item.description: The comedian poked fun at Meghan and Harry's Netflix track record, shortly after the duchess announced she was delaying the release of her lifestyle show in the wake of the Los Angeles wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: CompTIA unveils AI Essentials training resource
item.description: Artificial intelligence is changing how work gets done, creating new technology roles, and transforming the entire employment landscape.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft reports 10% quarterly profit growth as it works to show AI investments paying off
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How to make sure you’ve got the cybersecurity people you need
item.description: The government's personnel shop has devised a five-part strategy for planning, hiring and retaining cybersecurity people. But not everyone follows the strategy. The post How to make sure you’ve got the cybersecurity people you need first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: iPhones on T-Mobile can access Starlink satellite communications
item.description: Starlink support appears to be a secret iOS 18.3 feature for iPhones, some of which now support satellite communication services from SpaceX — but only for users invited to join public beta testing of the service on US carrier T-Mobile.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Don’t be so quick to click that Google Calendar invite. It could be a hacker’s trap
item.description: A phishing campaign uses Google Calendar to schedule fake meeting invitations that appear legitimate, redirecting targets to phishing sites.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DeepSeek's new AI chatbot and ChatGPT answer sensitive questions about China differently
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Chinese tech startup DeepSeek ’s new artificial intelligence chatbot has sparked discussions about the competition between China and the U.S. in AI development, with many users flocking to test the rival of OpenAI's ChatGPT. DeepSeek’s AI assistant was the No.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Upstart Chinese AI company DeepSeek's founder started out as a low-key hedge fund entrepreneur
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — The 40-year-old founder of China’s DeepSeek, an AI startup that has startled markets with its capacity to compete with industry leaders like OpenAI, kept a low profile as he built up a hedge fund and then refined its quantitative models to branch into artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How to advance federal workforce efficiencies amid shifting priorities
item.description: Agencies can save time and money — and increase hiring success — by moving to modern human resources solutions, workforce tech experts explain. The post How to advance federal workforce efficiencies amid shifting priorities first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: The crisis of AI’s hidden costs
item.description: The AI gold rush is creating an unexpected problem: massive waste in resource provisioning. Cloud cost overruns inevitably lead to a lack of true ROI for these systems. Many enterprises spend $2 to get $1 of benefits. That dog won’t hunt.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump says Microsoft is one of the companies eyeing TikTok
item.description: President Donald Trump said Monday evening that Microsoft is among the U.S. companies looking to take control of TikTok to help the popular app avert an effective ban that could kick-in in April.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Prompt Security adds code sanitization, data leak prevention for GitHub Copilot
item.description: Prompt Security has announced an upgrade to its security and governance platform for GitHub Copilot and other AI coding assistants.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Sweden seizes vessel suspected of 'sabotage' after undersea data cable rupture in Baltic Sea
item.description: RIGA, Latvia (AP) — Swedish prosecutors announced Sunday night that they have opened a preliminary investigation into suspected aggravated “sabotage” and ordered the detention of a vessel in the Baltic Sea suspected of damaging an underwater fiber optic cable connecting Latvia and the Swedish island
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
